name: Ride By Your Side LLC
districts_or_customers: Oklahoma Medicaid non-emergency medical transport patients in Tulsa area; not a school district contractor
recent_news: LLC formed 1/15/2020; operates as non-emergency medical transport van under USDOT 3410616; no school-bus or M&A activity identified
fit_notes: NOT a fit. Single-vehicle NEMT van operator (2 employees, ~$92K revenue), not a school-bus contractor. Too small and wrong service category for Summit tuck-in.

name: Gent Trans
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade STS/Medicaid riders; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No web presence, no news, no website; only listing is the address (1100 NE 125th St #206, North Miami) and phone. Not classified as school-bus operator in any state DOE/PDE data found
fit_notes: NOT a fit. Sole-operator with ~$66K revenue and no digital footprint; consistent with an individual STS/NEMT subcontractor van, not a school-bus contractor. No platform value for Summit.

name: Ozark Wheelchair Cab Co
districts_or_customers: Brevard County wheelchair riders (historic); no school district contracts
recent_news: Principal James Lee Kimberlin of Palm Bay died July 2014 per Legacy.com obituary; business listing appears stale/likely dormant. Never a school-bus contractor
fit_notes: NOT a fit. Wheelchair-taxi sole proprietorship, owner deceased >10 years ago; business effectively defunct and not in school-bus segment. No relevance to Summit.

name: Liberty Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: No Muscogee County School District or Georgia DOE school-bus contract identified; not Liberty Transit (Hinesville) which is a public agency
recent_news: No website, no media coverage, no Georgia NEMT broker (Verida/Modivcare) listing surfaced for this name/owner
fit_notes: NOT a fit. Single-employee, ~$36K revenue listing with no digital footprint or contract evidence; likely individual NEMT subcontractor, not a school-bus operator. Irrelevant to Summit.

name: Gerald R Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: None - operates as freight carrier per FMCSA, not a student transportation provider
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER lists Gerald R Peck Transportation Inc (USDOT 3270835, McConnellsburg PA) as a freight/property trucking company; no school-bus authority. McConnellsburg-area Peck family also operates Peck's Refuse Disposal (separate entity)
fit_notes: NOT a fit. FMCSA-classified freight trucking carrier, not a Pennsylvania school-bus contractor. Wrong industry; exclude from Summit pipeline.
